\doxysubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{adjustZRange()}{adjustZRange()}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily \label{DomainLayered3D_8cpp_a83b3a83c01e3d7a487d4ae2ec65695f5} 
std\+::vector$<$ double $>$ adjust\+ZRange (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{const std\+::vector$<$ double $>$ \&}]{z}{, }\item[{const std\+::vector$<$ double $>$ \&}]{zlayer}{, }\item[{double}]{zmin}{, }\item[{double}]{margin}{}\end{DoxyParamCaption})}



Adjusts the Z-\/coordinate range with a margin while ensuring boundaries. 

This helper function modifies the input Z-\/range by adding a margin while ensuring that the adjusted range stays within the specified layer boundaries.


\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em z} & The original Z-\/coordinate range as a vector of two values (min, max). \\
\hline
{\em zlayer} & The Z-\/coordinate boundaries of the layer. \\
\hline
{\em zmin} & Minimum allowed vertical range. \\
\hline
{\em margin} & Fraction of the range used to adjust the boundaries. \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
\begin{DoxyReturn}{Returns}
A vector containing the adjusted Z-\/range (min, max). 
\end{DoxyReturn}

Reads a set of 3D positions from a file. 

This function reads a file containing 3D coordinates (x, y, z) line by line and returns a vector of rvec objects representing these positions.


\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em filename} & The name of the file containing position data. \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
\begin{DoxyReturn}{Returns}
A vector of rvec objects containing the parsed positions. 
\end{DoxyReturn}

\begin{DoxyExceptions}{Exceptions}
{\em std\+::runtime\+\_\+error} & if the file cannot be opened. \\
\hline
\end{DoxyExceptions}

Solves a system of linear equations using the LU factorization. 


\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em TRANS} & Specifies the form of the system of equations (\textquotesingle{}N\textquotesingle{} for no transpose, etc.). \\
\hline
{\em N} & Order of the coefficient matrix. \\
\hline
{\em NRHS} & Number of right-\/hand sides. \\
\hline
{\em A} & Pointer to the LU-\/factored coefficient matrix. \\
\hline
{\em LDA} & Leading dimension of A. \\
\hline
{\em IPIV} & Pointer to the pivot indices from {\ttfamily zgetrf\+\_\+}. \\
\hline
{\em B} & Pointer to the right-\/hand side vector(s). \\
\hline
{\em LDB} & Leading dimension of B. \\
\hline
{\em INFO} & Output status (0 if successful). \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
